name: Rock Cornish Game Hens - Roasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the birds inside and out with lemon and sprinkle well with salt and freshly ground pepper.
2. Preheat oven to 450°F.
3. Fill cavities with stuffing.
4. Close opening with skewers and lace with string crisscrossed around them, also tying legs.
5. Place birds, breast side up, on a rack in an open roasting pan and cover breasts with bacon.
6. Cool for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 325°F and add red wine.
8. Roast for 35 to 40 minutes, basting occasionally and adding more wine if needed.
9. Serve with asparagus in lemon butter and a Burgundy wine.
Makes 4 servings.
